name: Waterdeep
summary: The City of Splendors, where masked lords, guilds, nobles, temples, crime syndicates and adventurers crowd behind high walls.
politics: The Masked Lords rule through mystery, law and careful manipulation.
Guild power touches almost every trade and service in the city.
culture: Cosmopolitan, proud and theatrical; status matters, but coin and competence matter too.
Every ward has its own manners, risks and opportunities.
